description: Use the final ontology and dataset analysis results to induce New Zealand-specific ontologies for legal, parliamentary, policy, rules-as-code, graph, vector, and publication applications.
oracle_notes: Track 31 is complete as a deterministic repo-side NZ ontology induction layer. It exports reviewable NZ ontology candidates, SKOS vocabularies, Turtle, JSON-LD, and documentation from Track 25/29 evidence. Full-corpus induction remains bounded by Track 32 dataset statistics.
